raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Assembly Bill 396 will help feed thousands of California students currently struggling with hunger and food insecurity.",
    "AB 396 will allow students enrolled in qualifying employment and training programs to access federally-funded CalFresh food benefits.",
    "Currently, college students are ineligible for CalFresh benefits unless they are working at least 20 hours a week or fall within several enumerated exemptions.",
    "AB 396 focuses on the Employment and Training services program exemption to help students participating in qualifying programs claim CalFresh benefits.",
    "There are over 9,000 potentially qualifying programs in the California Community College system, according to data from the U.S. Department of Education.",
    "Research has exposed a high prevalence of hunger and food insecurity on California’s college campuses, with nearly one in three California college students facing food and housing insecurity.",
    "A recent report shows that almost 3 out of every 5 students are experiencing basic needs insecurity during the COVID-19 pandemic."
  ]
}
```
